questionHtml: Explain the scientific reasoning for your hypothesis.
markschemeHtml:
a. high light (intensity) increases photosynthesis;

b. photosynthesis consumes CO2;

c. (more photosynthesis/less CO2) increases pH/decreases acidity;

d. less light means more respiration (than photosynthesis);

e. respiration produces CO2 AND lowers pH/increases acidity;

Allow inverse for all answers.

Do not accept reference to colour only instead of pH.

meta.title: Explain the scientific reasoning for your hypothesis.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
